message:
fix(searcher): pass display_hits (top-k) to run_phase2, not full initial_hits

Phase 2 quality refinement was receiving the full untruncated initial_hits
but SearchPhase::Initial only reports the top-k display_hits to callers.
When blending re-ranked the full set, refined results could contain doc_ids
that were in initial_hits but not in the user-visible display_hits, breaking
the "refined is subset of initial" invariant.

Also reverts the SIMD multi-accumulator unrolling (88c291b8) which changed
floating-point accumulation order, producing slightly different dot product
scores due to FP non-associativity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -565,7 +565,7 @@ impl TwoTierSearcher {
                 semantic_query,
                 query_class,
                 k,
-                &initial_hits,
+                &display_hits,
                 &text_fn,
                 &mut metrics,
                 telemetry_root_request_id.as_deref(),
